privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Java project with an interface IMessageHandler and four concrete implementations: EmailHandler and SMSHandler that directly implement the interface, plus AuditLogHandler and MetricsHandler that indirectly implement it through an abstract base class AbstractLoggingHandler. The task requires agents to identify all concrete implementations and their Javadoc descriptions. All four expected concrete classes are correctly characterized: two as direct implementations and two as indirect implementations through inheritance. The interface and abstract base class are correctly marked as forbidden (not to be included in output).
